lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and requires major repairs to be functional. Both the interior and exterior show extensive wear and damage.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or wear. The interior is pristine and shows no signs of use. All mechanical systems are functioning perfectly.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require a dedicated owner to bring it back to life. While it technically starts, the engine has a noticeable knock and the transmission shifts roughly between gears. The exterior shows its age with significant rust on the rocker panels and clear coat failure on the hood and roof. Inside, the driver's seat is torn and several electrical components, including the radio and power windows, are non-functional. It is being sold as-is and would likely best serve as a project car or for parts.
Fair condition.

Get ready for a reliable ride that won't break the bank! This car has plenty of character and has been a dependable companion over the years. While it shows some honest wear and tear both inside and out, it remains a solid choice for anyone looking for functional transportation at a fantastic price. It’s ready for its next chapter with you!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently maintained. The powertrain is solid, with a smooth-running engine and responsive transmission. The interior remains clean and comfortable, showing only light wear consistent with careful use. On the exterior, the paint is in great shape, though you will find a few minor stone chips on the front fascia and a small scuff on one of the alloy wheels. All features, including the infotainment system and AC, are in perfect working order. It's a dependable, well-kept car that requires no immediate repairs.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard of absolute perfection. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting impeccable aesthetics and flawless mechanical integrity. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a truly pristine, investment-grade automobile.

Hey there! I’m so excited to find a new home for this absolute gem. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape that you’d swear it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been totally pampered and kept in pristine condition—not a scratch or mark anywhere. It drives like a total dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions!
Offered is an exceptional E46 M3, featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VAN
Mint condition. Single owner. Garaged since purchase. Full service records. No accidents. Flawless interior and exterior.

This is a rare opportunity to own a truly showroom-quality vehicle that has been preserved with obsessive care. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-like finish, free of even the smallest stone chips or blemishes. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-new condition, featuring supple, unscuffed leather and a dashboard that has never seen direct sun. Mechanically, the car performs exactly as it did the day it rolled off the lot, supported by a comprehensive, gap-free service history and recent premium detailing. Garaged since day one and driven only in fair weather, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its model’s condition.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics, paired with a mechanical profile that reflects rigorous, preventative care. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, every detail confirms its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning driver. We invite you to experience a level of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence, this vehicle stands in truly immaculate condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a specimen that mirrors its original showroom state. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to mechanical and aesthetic integrity. This vehicle serves as the definitive benchmark for its class.

Hey there! Are you ready to fall in love with your next ride? This car is an absolute gem and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been meticulously cared for, kept in pristine shape, and drives like a total dream. You won't find a single flaw on this beauty—it's as close to perfect as it gets. Come check it out and see for yourself why I’m so excited about it!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the legendary S54 platform. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six features a dual-VANOS system and individual throttle bodies, delivering linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. This specimen boasts a documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul for preventative reliability. The chassis is dialed in with Bilstein PSS10 adjustable coilovers, enhancing the factory's near-perfect 50/50 weight distribution. Power is transmitted through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual to a variable M-differential lock. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains its factory luster with zero panel misalignment or paint degradation. This is a collector-grade driver’s machine, mechanically sorted and visually flawless.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Interior like new. Mechanically perfect. Clean title. No accidents.

Experience automotive excellence with this showroom-quality vehicle, meticulously maintained to meet the highest standards. The exterior features a mirror-like finish, free of any imperfections, while the interior retains its original factory scent, boasting untouched leather seating and a pristine dashboard. Mechanically flawless, this car comes with a comprehensive service history, documenting its life as a pampered, garage-kept treasure. Every component, from the whisper-quiet engine to the spotless undercarriage and unmarked alloy wheels, performs perfectly. This is a rare find for the discerning buyer seeking a truly 'as-new' driving experience without the new-car price tag.

We are privileged to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, characterized by a flawless exterior finish and a pristine, smoke-free interior that retains its original luster. Meticulously preserved and mechanically peerless, this automobile offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its debut. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering stands as a definitive statement in automotive excellence.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserving its showroom-floor integrity both mechanically and aesthetically. Every surface reflects a commitment to fastidious care, offering the discerning collector or enthusiast a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly superlative condition. We invite serious inquiries to experience this benchmark of quality firsthand.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute dream of a car, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor today! It’s been pampered since day one, kept in a climate-controlled garage, and driven very sparingly. If you’re looking for that 'brand new' feel without the brand new price tag, this is the one for you. It runs like a clock and looks absolutely stunning inside and out. Come see it for yourself—you won’t be disappointed!

Offered here is a museum-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS high-pressure variable valve timing. This specimen boasts a flawless subframe, reinforced for structural rigidity, and retains its factory-spec McPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension geometry. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to an M Variable Differential Lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains exceptionally stiff, with zero evidence of oxidation or fatigue. Every bushing, seal, and fluid line is in prime operational state, delivering the communicative steering and telepathic handling this platform
2021 Sedan. Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or mechanical issues. Service records available. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a true 'time capsule' specimen that has been preserved with obsessive care. The exterior is finished in a deep, lustrous metallic paint that remains entirely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, retaining its original showroom brilliance. Every body panel is laser-straight with perfect factory gaps. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium hand-stitched leather seats show no signs of bolster wear or creasing, and the interior still carries that distinct 'new car' aroma. All tactile surfaces, from the steering wheel to the switchgear, feel crisp and unused. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been maintained exclusively by specialized technicians with a comprehensive service history included. The engine bay is concours-level clean, and the undercarriage is spotless, reflecting a life spent in a climate-controlled garage and never driven in inclement weather. For the buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this car delivers a driving experience that is indistinguishable from the day it first left the dealership.

Presented here is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish paired with a pristine interior, reflecting a history of rigorous upkeep and climate-controlled storage. Every mechanical component has been vetted to ensure peak performance, offering the discerning buyer a showroom-quality experience. This represents an unrivaled opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly superlative condition.

We are pleased to offer this exemplary vehicle, presented in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and exhibiting no signs of wear, this specimen represents the pinnacle of its class. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, confirms its status as an investment-grade acquisition for the most fastidious of collectors. This is a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle of unrivaled integrity.

Hey everyone! Check out this absolute beauty! 🚗 I've babied this car since day one, and it’s honestly in pristine, showroom condition. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. You won't find one cleaner than this! I'm sad to see it go, but I'm excited for it to find a great new home. Let me know if you want to come take a look!

This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) is a museum-grade example of the S54-powered icon, featuring factory-spec individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. The chassis is structurally impeccable with documented subframe reinforcement and a fully serviced dual-VANOS system. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M-differential lock, ensuring optimal mechanical grip. Finished in Alpine White with a flawless Nappa leather interior, the vehicle retains its factory-correct suspension geometry and forged Style 67 wheels. This specimen offers a rare, showroom-fresh driving experience for the discerning collector who demands peak atmospheric performance.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Full service records. No cosmetic or mechanical flaws. Interior is like new.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical market offering. This specimen exhibits flawless aesthetic integrity and mechanical precision, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail has been curated to ensure a showroom-quality experience that remains unrivaled in its class.
